---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for acc
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

acc is a memory + tool loop that compounds from real outcomes. The features that land are
the ones grounded in a concrete need — so tell us the problem first, then the idea.

> Want a new coding-agent harness supported (OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, or another)? That has
> its own template: [harness integration](./harness_integration.md).

## The problem

What are you trying to do that acc makes hard or impossible today? Describe the situation,
not just the missing button.

## The idea

What would you like acc to do? Be as concrete as you can.

## Why it matters

Who benefits, and how often does this come up?

## Alternatives you've considered

Workarounds you're using now, or other approaches you weighed.

## Scope notes

acc's distribution glue (install scripts + `plugins/`) is open and welcomes contributions;
the engine itself ships as a prebuilt binary. A feature that lives entirely in the glue is
something you can prototype and PR yourself — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
Engine-side ideas are still very welcome here as requests.

## Anything else

Mockups, links, prior art, or related issues.
